body: Full session archive zipped and sent: tungsten_session_2026-07-23.zip. Contains SESSION_SUMMARY.md (the whole WARRANT#91-96 arc: watchdog QuickEdit fix -> CREATE_NO_WINDOW fix, P2 numeric corruption, mislabeled enh-check, shrinkage+H4-triangulation trims, plateau detection, the confirmed zero-divide crash + fix, and the MT4-log-buffering monitoring lesson), current source+ex4 (SLS92/10.06), forge_ledger.json through pass_77, both watchdog scripts, and a live snapshot of the current run (session RUN_20260723_2202 -- r8/9 Building Momentum in progress as of the snapshot, healthy, zero crashes since WARRANT#95). The live run is still going -- this is a snapshot, not a final result.
